title: volvulus sepium var. americanus
intro: Volvulus sepium var. americanus, also known as American Devil's Claw, is a plant native to North America that belongs to the family Capparaceae. Traditionally, American Devil's Claw has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of this plant include relief from arthritis, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. American Devil's Claw can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with herbal preparations often involving the plant's roots, which are harvested and dried for medicinal use.
